## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and discuss strategy for GrowthX Labs' thought leadership and case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Thought leadership content saw 75% increase in URL clicks (4 to 7) and 17.8% increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Agentic AI blog post identified for potential revision to improve engagement](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Team to focus on 2nd and 3rd priority content clusters after thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Internal linking strategy for de-graph articles to be clarified with Jessica](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Review

  - [Looker rolling performance report for thought leadership category:](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
      - [75% increase in URL clicks (4 to 7)](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
      - [17.8% increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [De-graph migration contributing to significant increase in graph metrics](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Agentic AI blog: good impressions but low engagement](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
      - [Opportunity to revise with different meta description, headers](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
      - [Aim to improve CTR to match site benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

### Content Strategy and Priorities

  - [Thought leadership remains top priority](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Next focus: 2nd and 3rd priority clusters](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [Knowledge Graph Foundations (model native content)](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Team to monitor performance and iterate](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Flag issues requiring Sidira's input on direction](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

### Internal Linking Strategy

  - [Unlisted de-graph articles present linking opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Two potential approaches:](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
    1.  Use Air Ops to find relevant links (if articles are indexed)
    2.  Manual human editing for citing/snippets (if not indexed)
  - [Jimmy to clarify with Jessica on specific approach](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Content likely already migrated to Hyper Mode domain, causing traffic increase](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

### Case Studies Revenue Line

  - [Case studies build trust, leading to interest in product and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/UUr1JfKcNmo-DbstcLctxhPsDLF8pNvF?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
